---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit code changes or improvements
title: "[Type] Brief description"
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of your changes. Include the motivation and context for this pull request.

---

## Type of Change

Please select the type of change:

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

---

## Related Issues

Close any related issues by mentioning them:

Closes #(issue number)
Related to #(issue number)

---

## Motivation and Context

Explain why this change is needed and what problem it solves.

---

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Automated tests
- [ ] Build verification
- [ ] Linting verification
- [ ] Other (specify)

**Test Details:**

```

```

---

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the changes locally
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] Build completes without errors
- [ ] Linting passes without issues

---

## Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have removed any console logs or debugging code
- [ ] Variables and functions have descriptive names
- [ ] Code is DRY and avoids duplication

---

## Documentation Updates

- [ ] README.md updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Code comments added/updated
- [ ] JSDoc/TypeDoc comments added
- [ ] Architecture documentation updated (if applicable)

---

## Breaking Changes

If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe them and migration path:

```

```

Add any other context about the pull request here:

- Performance impact:
- Security impact:
- Dependencies changed:
- Configuration changes:

---

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots showing the changes:

---

## Reviewer Notes

_Optional: Provide any notes for reviewers to help them understand the changes._

---

## Final Checklist

- [ ] Branch is up to date with main
- [ ] Commits are meaningful and well-organized
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] PR description is clear and complete
- [ ] All checks pass

**Thank you for contributing to Heildamm!**
